title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Patna Sahib
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Patna Sahib assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: High stakes battle in Patna Sahib as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Patna Sahib. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Patna Sahib
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Patna Sahib constituency.

title: Political rally in Patna Sahib draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Patna Sahib promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Patna Sahib
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Patna Sahib assembly segment.
